title: Atractocarpus longipes
taxonomy: Atractocarpus longipes is a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Atractocarpus, which is a group of flowering plants. The plant is native to Australia, where it is found in tropical and subtropical regions. Within the Rubiaceae family, Atractocarpus longipes is classified as a member of the tribe Palicoureeae. Its classification provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Rubiaceae family.
